feed.title: oriz · finance
feed.subtitle: SIP, EMI, FIRE, tax — calculators that show the math.

entry.title: oriz-finance launches: free, browser-only calculators
entry.summary: SIP, lumpsum, step-up SIP, SWP, FIRE, EMI, FD, RD, PPF, NPS, take-home, HRA, GST — all in your browser, nothing leaves the device.
